title: Realtime WebSocket Communication
description: Client connects via WebSocket; audio and events are streamed bidirectionally to/from agent. The server bridges a browser/client WebSocket connection to the OpenAI Realtime API over a persistent WebSocket connection, orchestrating audio streaming, tool approvals, guardrails, and agent handoffs.

actors.name: Client (Browser)
actors.description: Web browser or any WebSocket client connecting to /ws/{session_id}

actors.name: RealtimeWebSocketManager
actors.description: FastAPI server component (server.py); manages per-session connections, routes client messages, serializes events back to client

actors.name: RealtimeSession
actors.description: Core session class (session.py); implements RealtimeModelListener; owns event queue, history, tool-call tasks, guardrail tasks

actors.name: OpenAI Realtime API
actors.description: OpenAI WebSocket endpoint; bidirectional stream of model events and client events (OpenAIRealtimeWebSocketModel)

use_cases.name: Connect WebSocket Session
use_cases.description: Client opens WS to /ws/{session_id}. Manager accepts, creates RealtimeRunner with starting agent, calls runner.run(model_config), enters async context, registers RealtimeSession as model listener, connects to OpenAI Realtime API, emits initial history_updated event.

use_cases.name: Stream Audio to Agent
use_cases.description: Client sends {type:'audio', data:[int16...]} frames. Manager converts int16 array to bytes and forwards to session.

use_cases.name: Receive Audio from Agent
use_cases.description: Session receives RealtimeModelAudioEvent from model, emits RealtimeAudio session event. Manager serializes audio as base64 and sends to client WebSocket.

use_cases.name: Commit Audio Buffer
use_cases.description: Client sends {type:'commit_audio'}. Manager forwards input_audio_buffer.commit as raw client event to the model to force-end current input turn.

use_cases.name: Send Image to Agent
use_cases.description: Client sends {type:'image', data_url, text} for inline images, or {image_start}/{image_chunk}/{image_end} for chunked images. Manager assembles and sends RealtimeUserInputMessage with input_image + input_text content.
key_steps: Chunked path: accumulate image_buffers[id].chunks, join on image_end, then send

use_cases.name: Interrupt Agent Response
use_cases.description: Client sends {type:'interrupt'}. Manager calls session.interrupt(), which sends RealtimeModelSendInterrupt to model, stopping current playback.

use_cases.name: Approve Tool Call
use_cases.description: After receiving tool_approval_required event, client sends {type:'tool_approval_decision', call_id, approve:true, always?}. Manager calls session.approve_tool_call(call_id, always=always).
key_steps: Tool invoked, result sent back to model via send_event(RealtimeModelSendToolOutput)

use_cases.name: Reject Tool Call
use_cases.description: Client sends {type:'tool_approval_decision', call_id, approve:false, always?}. Manager calls session.reject_tool_call(call_id). Session sends rejection message back to model.

use_cases.name: Execute Function Tool (async)
use_cases.description: Model emits function_call event. Session evaluates if approval needed. If not (or approved), runs the tool as async task. Result sent back to model.
key_steps: If needs approval: emit RealtimeToolApprovalRequired, suspend in _pending_tool_calls

use_cases.name: Handle Agent Handoff
use_cases.description: During tool call, session detects a Handoff object. Updates current agent, sends session update with new agent settings, emits RealtimeHandoffEvent.

use_cases.name: Enforce Output Guardrails
use_cases.description: During transcript_delta events, session accumulates text. Once debounce threshold (default 100 chars) is reached, enqueues guardrail check task. If guardrail trips, sends interrupt + emits RealtimeGuardrailTripped.

use_cases.name: Stream Session Events to Client
use_cases.description: Background task _process_events iterates over session events and serializes them to the client WebSocket as JSON.

use_cases.name: Disconnect Session
use_cases.description: On WebSocketDisconnect, manager exits session context (cleanup), removes all session/context/websocket entries.
key_steps: Cancel guardrail and tool-call tasks, disconnect model

key_relationships: RealtimeWebSocketManager uses RealtimeRunner to create RealtimeSession
RealtimeSession wraps OpenAIRealtimeWebSocketModel (bidirectional WebSocket to OpenAI)
RealtimeWebSocketManager routes client messages to RealtimeSession methods
RealtimeSession emits RealtimeSessionEvent objects consumed by RealtimeWebSocketManager._process_events
RealtimeSession manages RealtimeAgent and supports handoff to another RealtimeAgent
audio_format: int16 PCM (client-side array packed via struct), base64-encoded in server→client direction
image_transfer: Single {type:'image'} or chunked {image_start/image_chunk/image_end} protocol; assembled into RealtimeUserInputMessage with input_image + input_text content
tool_approval_flow: Model emits function_call → session checks needs_approval → if required: suspend in _pending_tool_calls + emit tool_approval_required to client → client sends tool_approval_decision → approve/reject routes back to _handle_tool_call or _send_tool_rejection
guardrails: Output guardrails run on transcript deltas with debounce threshold (default 100 chars); if tripped, model is interrupted and RealtimeGuardrailTripped event emitted
